summary: Refactoring Phase 2 regression testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed. Route collision fix verified - /api/invoices/stats now correctly returns stats instead of 'Facture non trouvée'. Frontend ProductsTab and all other extracted tabs working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span> in tables - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality (pre-existing from iteration_32)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/stats?date=2026-04-16 returns 200 with total_revenue, invoice_count, by_department (NOT 'Facture non trouvée')
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/stats/monthly?year=2026&month=4 returns 200 with total_revenue, invoice_count, by_department, daily_stats
✅ Backend: GET /api/analytics/dashboard?year=2026&month=4 returns {current, previous, growth}
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/revenue-by-payment?week_start=2026-04-13 returns total, by_method, period_start
✅ Backend: GET /api/caisse/users returns users list
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with password=Caisse2026 returns admin token
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with pin=2468 returns gérante token
✅ Backend: POST /api/caisse/login with invalid PIN returns 401
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/{valid_id} returns invoice (route collision fix verified)
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices/{invalid_id} returns 404 (not confused with /invoices/stats)
✅ Backend: GET /api/financial-points works (router not broken by include_router reordering)
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/products works
✅ Backend: GET /api/subscriptions works
✅ Backend: GET /api/invoices list works
✅ Frontend: Admin login with Caisse2026 works
✅ Frontend: ProductsTab (data-testid='products-tab') renders correctly
✅ Frontend: Add product button (data-testid='add-product-btn') visible for admin
✅ Frontend: Products displayed by department (Plats, Accomp., Jeux, Bar, Location, Autres)
✅ Frontend: ActiviteTab (data-testid='activite-tab') renders correctly
✅ Frontend: UsersTab (data-testid='users-tab') renders correctly
✅ Frontend: ClientsTab (data-testid='clients-tab') renders correctly
✅ Frontend: AnalyticsTab (data-testid='analytics-tab') renders correctly
✅ Frontend: Hebdo tab renders weekly report correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Route collision fix correctly implemented: include_router for reports.py placed BEFORE inline /invoices/{invoice_id} route in server.py (line 84)
caisse_users.py router correctly extracted with all 5 endpoints (create, login, list, update, delete)
reports.py router correctly extracted with 4 endpoints (invoice stats, monthly stats, analytics dashboard, revenue by payment)
ProductsTab.jsx correctly implements data-testid attributes for testing
All other routers (financial_points, stock, subscriptions, service_reports) continue to work after include_router reordering
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring Phase 2 complete. Route collision between /invoices/stats and /invoices/{invoice_id} fixed by placing include_router calls before inline routes. All extracted components (ProductsTab, reports.py, caisse_users.py) working correctly. React hydration warning in AnalyticsTab/HebdoReport tables is cosmetic only.

route_collision_fix_verification.issue: Before fix: /api/invoices/stats was matched by /invoices/{invoice_id} returning 'Facture non trouvée'
route_collision_fix_verification.fix: include_router for reports_router placed BEFORE inline /invoices/{invoice_id} route definition
